attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WCSA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
   WCSA.SR_NUMBER,
   DECODE (WCSA.THEATER, 'APAC', 'SYDNEY', WCSA.THEATER)
      AS TRANSIT_THEATER,
   WCSA.DELIVERY_CHANNEL,
   WCSA.WG_NAME,
   (WCSA.ACCRUED_ACOD * COALESCE (WCCC.TAC_COST_PER_ACOD, 0))
      AS TAC_COST,
   (WCSA.ACCRUED_ACOD * COALESCE (WCCC.TSB_COST_PER_ACOD, 0))
      AS TSB_COST,
   (WCSA.ACCRUED_ACOD * COALESCE (WCCC.TBO_COST_PER_ACOD, 0))
      AS TBO_COST,
   1 INIT_SEVERITY,
   WCVF.UPDATED_COT_TECH_KEY,
   WCVF.PROBLEM_CODE,
   WCSA.ACCRUED_ACOD ACCRUED_FIN_ACOD,
   ECAC.ID AS ACOD,
   COALESCE(NULLIF(COMPLEXITY_ID,-1),0) AS COMPLEXITY,
   WCVF.CUSTOMER,
   WCVF.SERVICE_SUB_GROUP,
   WCVF.HW_FAMILY,
   WCSR.PRODUCT_ID,
   DECODE (WCVF.MARKET_SEGMENT, 'UNKNOWN', 'UNKNOWN CUSTOMER MARKET SEGMENT',UPPER (WCVF.MARKET_SEGMENT)) AS           MARKET_SEGMENT,
   WCSR.CUST_COUNTRY,
   WCVF.SA_NUMBER,
   WCVF.CEC_ID,
   WCVF.ENTRY_CHANNEL,
   WCVF.EXT_DELIVERY_CHANNEL AS CLOSED_DELIVERY_CHANNEL,
   WCVF.SR_TYPE,
   WCVF.CONTRACT,
   'N/A' AS TECHNOLOGY,
   'N/A' AS GLOBAL_TECHNOLOGY
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_CCM_SR_ACOD WCSA
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_COST_CENTER WCCC ON WCCC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT= cast(WCSA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT as integer) 
AND WCCC.THEATER=CASE WHEN WCSA.THEATER='APAC' THEN 'SYDNEY'ELSE  WCSA.THEATER END AND WCCC.DELIVERY_CHANNEL= WCSA.DELIVERY_CHANNEL
INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_VOLUME_FACT WCVF ON WCSA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = WCVF.FISCAL_MONTH_ID AND WCSA.SR_NUMBER =CAST(WCVF.SR_NUMBER AS BIGINT)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SR_ATTRIBUTE WCSR ON WCSR.INCIDENT_NUMBER= cast( WCVF.SR_NUMBER as bigint)
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_ACOD_CLASSIFICATION ECAC ON ROUND(COALESCE (WCVF.ACOD_FINANCE_ACCRUED, 0)) BETWEEN ECAC.MIN_ACOD AND ECAC.MAX_ACOD
WHERE WCSA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = ( SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_FISCAL_MONTH_CTRL)

SELECT  WCSCH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
          , WCSCH.SR_NUMBER
          ,TRANSIT_THEATER
          ,DELIVERY_CHANNEL
          ,WG_NAME
          ,ACCRUED_FIN_ACOD
          ,TAC_COST
          ,TSB_COST
          ,TBO_COST
          ,INIT_SEVERITY
          ,UPDATED_COT_TECH_KEY
          ,PROBLEM_CODE
          ,ACCRUED_HC_ACOD
          ,ACCRUED_FIN_ACOD
          ,ACOD
          ,COMPLEXITY
          ,CUSTOMER
          ,SERVICE_SUB_GROUP
          ,HW_FAMILY
          ,ENT_PRODUCT_ID
          ,MARKET_SEGMENT
          ,CUST_COUNTRY
          ,SA_NUMBER
          ,CEC_ID
          ,ENTRY_CHANNEL
          ,CLOSED_DELIVERY_CHANNEL
          ,SR_TYPE
          ,CONTRACT
          ,TECHNOLOGY
          ,GLOBAL_TECHNOLOGY,
          CASE WHEN WCSA_SUMMARY.TOT_ACCRUED_FIN_ACOD = 0 then 0
                   WHEN WCSCH.ACCRUED_FIN_ACOD = 0 then 0
          ELSE  (WCSCH.ACCRUED_FIN_ACOD/WCSA_SUMMARY.TOT_ACCRUED_FIN_ACOD) END
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SR_COST_HIST1 WCSCH , (SELECT WCSA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
            WCSA.SR_NUMBER,
            SUM (WCSA.ACCRUED_ACOD) TOT_ACCRUED_FIN_ACOD,
            0 TOT_ACCRUED_HC_ACOD
       FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_TAC_SR_ACOD WCSA
   GROUP BY WCSA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT, WCSA.SR_NUMBER) WCSA_SUMMARY 
     WHERE WCSCH.SR_NUMBER= WCSA_SUMMARY.SR_NUMBER 
           and WCSCH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT= WCSA_SUMMARY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
           and WCSCH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_FISCAL_MONTH_CTRL)
